title: Echoes of Eden
author: Saint Black
description: Placeholder: a literary and spiritual exploration of lost origin, sacred memory, mystery, and the ache to return to divine alignment.
hooks: Some places are not lost. They are remembered by the soul.

title: The Pleiadian Project: A Cosmic Research Guide
author: Saint Black
description: Placeholder: a research-driven guide for exploring Pleiadian themes, cosmic narratives, star knowledge, and alternative history signals.
